content_body: Thank you so much for letting us share your beautiful cabin. I thought we were going to my boyfriend's home state of Kentucky and we were really coming here. On our first night we listened to music, grilled steaks, and then he got down on one knee and proposed!! It was the best night of my life and the atmosphere here made it just that much better!! It has been raining all weekend but NOTHING could damper the way I feel.
title: Proposal at Romantic Sanctuary in Blue Ridge, GA
